label: VBIED / VAAW
description: Vehicle-borne improvised explosive device (VBIED) or vehicle used as a weapon (VAAW). Encompasses car/van bombs and deliberate vehicle ramming attacks against people or structures.

label: Marauding Terrorist Attack (MTA / MTFA)
description: Coordinated attack by one or more individuals using bladed weapons, firearms, or improvised weapons to cause mass casualties while moving through a location.

label: PBIED
description: Person-borne improvised explosive device — a concealed explosive device carried or worn by an attacker, typically detonated in a crowded space.

label: IED / Drone / Mail Threat
description: Improvised explosive devices placed or delivered by hand, drone, or postal/courier service. Includes suspect packages and small unmanned aerial system (UAS) threats.

label: CBR / CBRN Attack
description: Chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear attack using toxic agents, pathogens, or radioactive material to cause harm, contamination, or mass disruption.

label: Burglary
description: Unlawful entry into premises with intent to steal, commit criminal damage, or cause harm. Includes forced entry, opportunistic access, and distraction techniques.

label: Theft
description: Deprivation of assets without consent. Includes shoplifting, employee theft, and theft of high-value or CRAVED (Concealable, Removable, Available, Valuable, Enjoyable, Disposable) items.

label: Vehicle Crime
description: Theft of vehicles, theft from vehicles, or criminal damage to vehicles. Includes carjacking, catalytic converter theft, and fuel theft.

label: Arson
description: Deliberate ignition of fire to destroy property, cause harm, or create disruption. May be opportunistic or targeted.

label: Trespass
description: Unauthorised entry onto land or into buildings without permission. Ranges from opportunistic to deliberate (protest, reconnaissance, squatting).

label: ASB / Criminal Damage
description: Anti-social behaviour, nuisance, intimidation, and deliberate damage to property. May escalate or create secondary risks.

label: Public Order / Protest
description: Protests, demonstrations, riots, or direct action that may disrupt operations, damage property, or endanger people.

label: Violence / Sexual Offences
description: Physical assault, domestic violence, threats of violence, and sexual offences on or near the premises.

label: Cybercrime
description: Attacks on IT, OT, and IoT systems including ransomware, phishing, DDoS, network intrusion, and operational technology compromise.

label: Information Theft
description: Theft or unauthorised disclosure of confidential, commercially sensitive, or personal data. Includes document theft, covert photography, and data exfiltration.

label: Insider Threat
description: Malicious or negligent actions by employees, contractors, or trusted individuals with authorised access. Includes sabotage, fraud, and data theft.

label: Serious Organised Crime
description: Organised criminal activity including drug supply, human trafficking, money laundering, and professional theft gangs targeting premises.

label: Kidnap, Ransom & Extortion
description: Threats to individuals or organisations including kidnapping, ransom demands, product contamination threats, and extortion via digital or physical means.
